text.title: Bidirectional Alert PR Linking
text.summary: Every agent-authored PR body MUST include the alert URL, an LLM-generated root-cause paragraph, and the path of the regression test; the alert page MUST link back to the PR — silent PRs and one-way links are rejected.

section.title: Mandatory PR body shape
section.p: The PR body is the only place humans see the agent's reasoning. Without the alert backlink, reviewers cannot validate that the patch addresses THIS exception versus a near-duplicate. Without the test path, reviewers cannot tell whether the fix was actually verified. The bidirectional link (alert → PR and PR → alert) closes the audit loop expected by SOC2 and HIPAA reviewers.

rule.statement: The PR body MUST contain (a) the alert URL inside a `Sentry alert:` (or vendor equivalent) line, (b) a `Root cause` section of one to three sentences, (c) a `Test added:` line with the test file path, and (d) a reviewer checklist with at least one unchecked item ("I have validated the patch addresses the alert"). The tracker side MUST be configured to render the PR URL on the alert page (Seer SCM Settings, Rollbar PR webhook, Bugsink GitHub integration). A PR with any of (a)/(b)/(c) missing fails the policy check and must not be merged.
rule.rationale: Reviewers under load default to "merge if CI green"; the missing-context PR is exactly where unrelated patches sneak in. The alert backlink also protects against duplicate PRs from re-triggered agents on the same alert.

example.code:
## Sentry alert https://sentry.io/organizations/acme/issues/9182/
## Root cause `PaymentCreateView` did not handle the `Idempotency-Key` header when value contained leading whitespace; `str.strip()` was missing before the cache lookup, causing a `KeyError` on retry.
## Test added `payments/tests/test_views.py::test_idempotency_key_strips_whitespace`
## Reviewer checklist - [ ] I have validated the patch addresses the alert - [ ] CI is green on the regression test
example.note: All four required pieces present; reviewer can audit in 30 seconds.

example.code:
## Summary Fix KeyError in payments.
(no alert URL, no test path, no checklist)
example.note: Indistinguishable from a manual fix; cannot be audited against the alert.

antipattern.description: The agent posts the alert URL as a comment after PR creation, "to keep the body clean".
antipattern.reason: Comments are not preserved on squash-merge; the audit trail breaks at release time. The link MUST live in the PR body itself.

section.reference: Reusable PR body skeleton with all four required sections.
Seer pipeline overview with PR-body template.
Bugsink (Sentry-compatible self-hosted) — same DSN, same body convention.
Rollbar MCP — exposes trace context to coding agents for PR bodies.
